evidence_quotes.quote: Games today are so easily lost because publishers can take away the limited license at any time according to their EULA.

paragraphs.text: Hi, I'm writing to hopefully expand this Act to include the preservation of video-games. A big part of my childhood was spent on games, games that i now 30yares later can share with my 5yare old son. I realize that it will most likely be impossible for him to do the same with his children when the time comes. Games today are so easily lost because publishers can take away the limited license at any time according to their EULA. If my son falls in love with a game published in his childhood it is likely to be unplayable in the future. Pleas Expand the scope of this Act so that games can be preserved for the future.
